title: U.S. Treasury Freezes $130M in Crypto Linked to Iran’s IRGC
summary: The U.S. Treasury has frozen a $130 million crypto wallet tied to Iran’s IRGC. This is part of a broader effort to track and seize assets linked to Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei, increasing economic pressure on Tehran.
body:
The U.S. Treasury has frozen a cryptocurrency wallet containing $130 million linked to Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC). Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent announced the move as part of a larger campaign to track and seize assets connected to Iran’s Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei. 

The frozen funds are part of a broader strategy to increase economic pressure on Tehran. The IRGC is a powerful military and political force in Iran, and the U.S. has long targeted its financial networks. This action underscores the growing use of cryptocurrency in global financial operations, including those of state actors. 

For everyday people, this news highlights how cryptocurrency is increasingly being used in geopolitical strategies. It also shows that even large sums of crypto can be tracked and seized by authorities. This could have implications for how individuals and entities use crypto for transactions, especially in regions under economic sanctions. 

Moving forward, watch for further actions by the U.S. Treasury targeting crypto wallets linked to sanctioned entities. If you’re involved in crypto transactions, be aware of the potential risks and ensure compliance with international regulations. Read more → https://bitcoinmagazine.com/news/bessent-says-treasury-froze-130m-iran
twitterThread: The U.S. Treasury just froze $130M in crypto linked to Iran’s IRGC. This is part of a bigger push to track assets tied to Supreme Leader Khamenei.
Crypto isn’t just for retail investors—it’s also a tool for state actors. The U.S. is cracking down, showing even large crypto wallets can be seized.

If you’re in crypto, pay attention to geopolitical risks. The U.S. is targeting sanctioned entities, and compliance is key. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-07-21-us-treasury-freezes-130m-in-crypto-linked-to-irans-irgc
standaloneTweet: The U.S. just froze $130M in crypto tied to Iran’s IRGC. This shows how crypto is becoming a key player in global financial strategies—be aware of the risks.
